summary: Comprehensive testing of 5 bug fixes completed. All critical bug fixes verified working correctly. Backend: 100% pass rate (9/9 tests). Frontend: All 5 bug fixes confirmed working. One minor backend bug fixed during testing (serialize_date function). Known issues documented.

known_issues_documented.issue: Project Details page does not fetch/display latest status updates from status_updates collection
known_issues_documented.verification: Code review confirms ProjectDetail.js does not query status_updates collection. Only displays computed metrics from project fields.

known_issues_documented.issue: AI sometimes sets incorrect health status when schedule is delayed
known_issues_documented.reason: Requires AI command testing which was not in scope for this test run

passed_tests: Backend: Timesheet restriction check (Thursday/Friday Sydney time) - Currently Tuesday, correctly restricted
Backend: Projects API returns health metrics (health, schedule_status, actual_progress)
Backend: My projects for status updates
Frontend: No React duplicate key warnings (Bug Fix #4)
Frontend: Timesheet restriction banners displayed on Weekly Check-in widget (Bug Fix #2)
Frontend: Status update restriction banners displayed on Project Status Check-in widget (Bug Fix #2)
Frontend: Dashboard health metrics displayed correctly (Bug Fix #3)
Frontend: Quick Add Resource widget has project selector dropdown (Bug Fix #4)
Frontend: Phase selection checkboxes visible and working (Bug Fix #1)
Frontend: Phase selection auto-fills dates from selected phase(s) (Bug Fix #1)
Frontend: Multiple phase selection updates date range correctly (Bug Fix #1)

medium_priority: Issue #2: Implement status updates display on Project Details page. The page should query the status_updates collection and display the latest updates in a timeline or list format.
Consider adding a 'Status History' tab or section on the Project Details page to show all status updates for the project.
low_priority: Issue #3: Test and verify AI health status logic when processing commands like 'project X is delayed'. Ensure health status is set to Amber/Red, not Green.
action_item_for_main_agent.notes: All 5 bug fixes are working correctly. The main agent has successfully implemented the fixes. Only known issues remain, which were already documented as not fixed.

bug_fix_1_phase_selection.details: Phase selection in AllocationEditor works perfectly. When a project with phases is selected, phase checkboxes appear. Selecting phases auto-fills start/end dates based on phase date ranges. Multiple phase selection correctly calculates earliest start and latest end date.
bug_fix_1_phase_selection.evidence: Screenshots show phase checkboxes for 'Discovery (Dec 23 - Jan 5)' and 'Development (Jan 6 - Jan 22)'. Dates auto-filled correctly.

bug_fix_2_timesheet_restriction.details: Both Weekly Check-in and Project Status Check-in widgets display restriction banners when it's not Thursday/Friday in Sydney timezone. Current day (Tuesday) correctly shows restriction with message 'Timesheet updates are only available on Thursday and Friday' and 'Next allowed: Thursday'.
bug_fix_2_timesheet_restriction.evidence: Both widgets show amber restriction banners with correct messaging.

bug_fix_3_dashboard_health.details: Dashboard Project Portfolio table displays health indicators (Green/Amber/Red badges) and progress bars. Projects API returns health, schedule_status, and actual_progress fields correctly.
bug_fix_3_dashboard_health.evidence: Backend API returns health='Green', schedule_status='Delayed', actual_progress=35. Frontend displays Green badge and progress bar.

bug_fix_4_quick_add_widget.details: Quick Add Resource widget on dashboard includes 'Select Project' dropdown with standaloneMode prop. Dropdown shows 6 available projects and allows project selection before adding resources.
bug_fix_4_quick_add_widget.evidence: Project selector dropdown visible and functional with 6 projects listed.

bug_fix_5_react_keys.details: No React duplicate key warnings found in browser console. The issue with duplicate keys in teamMembers array has been resolved.
bug_fix_5_react_keys.evidence: Console logs show no key-related warnings during dashboard load and navigation.
